Brawler.desc: Brawlers are monstrous fighters in battle that deal a lot damage.

Knight.desc: A loyal knight of the Kingdom that is promised a promotion to Royalty.
Knight.passive_ability: Takedowns grant a heal and a refill of soups.
Knight.active_ability: Promote to King for a duration after collecting enough souls.
Knight.details1: Refill and heal logic respects maximum inventory and health capacity limits.
Knight.details2: Promotion to King: Replaces all gear with a Gold Crown and a Gold Sword.
Knight.details3: The King's Gold Sword deals 16% of the target's maximum health as pre-mitigation damage.
Knight.details4: Original gear is restored upon demotion from King.

Alpha.desc: Alpha becomes a lot more fierceful with the pack.
Alpha.passive_ability: Extend your summon duration per takedown.
Alpha.active_ability: Summon wolves that attacks your last hit target.
Alpha.details1: Both you and your wolves gain speed during the duration of the ability.
Alpha.details2: The wolves should be able to damage themselves from the Hedgehog passive ability.

Viking.desc: Viking is a relentless force that weakens attackers and strikes lightning.
Viking.passive_ability: Weakens opponents for every tenth hit onto you for a duration.
Viking.active_ability: Summon a lightning bolt on the selected target and deal half of their current health as pre-mitigation damage and set opponent ablaze for a duration.
Viking.details1: The weakness applies onto the enemies after the enemies have hit Viking 10 times, the weakness stacks caps at Weakness 3.

Basilisk.desc: Basilisk strives in long term battles poisoning opponents.
Basilisk.passive_ability: Every 15th hit debuffs enemies and grants speed for a short duration.
Basilisk.active_ability: For a short duration, every hit drops a soup from the enemy's inventory.
Basilisk.details1: Whilst the enemy is poisoned, fatality is applied.
Basilisk.details2: Soups are dropped on the ground and can be picked back up by anyone.

Warrior.desc: Warrior is holy champion blessed by the heavens.
Warrior.passive_ability: Health restoration by soups is increased by 1 health and for every takedown you are granted heavenly buffs for a duration.
Warrior.details1: The heavenly buffs resets on takedown, it does not stack, also gain protection 1 on your helmet.
Warrior.details2: Immune to all negative effects during heavenly buffs.

Slayer.desc: Slayer is unmatched in raw strength.
Slayer.passive_ability: Maximize fury to critically strike for a duration.
Slayer.active_ability: Gain additional levels of sharpness for a duration.
Slayer.details1: Start decaying fury after 10 seconds of inactive combat.

Challenger.desc: Challenger is a master duelist that weakens a souls.
Challenger.passive_ability: Deal additional pre-mitigation damage every third hit.
Challenger.active_ability: Permanently weaken your selected target untill either one dies.
Challenger.details1: Cannot weaken Warrior while affected by Heavenly Buffs.
Challenger.details2: If you select another target, the original target's weakness is removed.

Shaman.desc: Shaman is a mystical combatant that casts dark magics.
Shaman.passive_ability: Take reduced damage and for every takedown on the opponent's death they drop a Horcrux.
Shaman.active_ability: Cast a dark magics projectile to slow your target, steal their positive effects and deal 65% of opponents maximum health as pre-mitigation damage.
Shaman.details1: Does not steal negative effects from target.
Shaman.details3: Refresh the duration of the effects by hitting a player.
Shaman.details2: Effects are given back to the original player when decayed.
Shaman.details4: Shaman is unable to steal Heavenly Buffs from Warrior nor apply a slow during Heavenly Buffs, still puts the ability on cooldown.
Shaman.details5: When you take fatal damage, one of your horcruxes available(oldest to recent) breaks and sets your health to 10hp.
Shaman.details6: Anyone can break your horcruxes even yourself.

Vampire.desc: Vampire drains the lifeforce of their opponents.
Vampire.passive_ability: Lifesteal 80% of damage dealt post-mitigation and deal additional damage based on the missing health of the target.
Vampire.active_ability: Enter a bloodlust that grants speed and increases lifesteal to 160% for a duration.
Vampire.details1: Will not spawn with any soups and also cannot use soups to restore health and can neither access refills.

Alchemist.desc: Alchemist is a master of brews that crafts arcane potions.
Alchemist.passive_ability: For every takedown, you gain an Orb based on the opponent class archetype.
Alchemist.details1: Spawns with 3x Splash Potions of Harming I, and has a maximum cap of 4 total potions.
Alchemist.details2: You can only hold 2 Orbs at once, the oldest is replaced if a 3rd is earned, making the 2nd orb now the oldest.
Alchemist.details3: Potions and Orbs override soups in inventory priority. Potions should appear in hotbar and Orbs should appear in inventory.

recipes: Red + Red: Splash Potion of Harming (Instant Damage II)
Green + Green: Splash Potion of Restoration (Instant Healing III + Resistance I + Fire Resistance I for 30 seconds)
Blue + Blue: Splash Potion of Distortion (Nausea + Slowness II for 15s)
Red + Green: Splash Potion of Acid (Intant Damage I + Weakness I for 20s)
Green + Blue: Splash Potion of Adrenaline (Speed II + Absorption V for 10s)
Blue + Red: Splash Potion of Concussion (Massive knockback: 20 Blocks)

Wrath.desc: Wrath overwhelms all opposition by an adaptive combat style.
Wrath.passive_ability: Hitting an opponent shifts your form based on their class archetype.
Wrath.active_ability: Activate a unique power based on your current form.
Wrath.details1: Hitting Brawlers/Tanks grants Brawler form. Hitting Duelists/Ranged grants Duelist form.
Wrath.details2: Spawn with no active ability but gain one when you hit someone.
Wrath.details3: Ability item overrides soups in inventory priority. (Hotbar Slot: 2)

passive_ability_info.brawler_form: Lifesteal 20% of damage dealt post-mitigation and deal pre-mitigation damage every fifth hit.

active_ability_info.brawler_active: Disables enemy ability activations for a duration in a radius.
active_ability_info.duelist_active: Dash in the direction you are looking.

Duelist.desc: Specialises in aggressive playstyles to outplay an opponent.

Fisherman.desc: Fisherman can teleport hooked enemies to them or may leap forward on marked location.
Fisherman.passive_ability: Apply slowness for a short duration on-hook.
Fisherman.active_ability: Teleports hooked players to your location or leap forward.
Fisherman.details1: Teleported players will be facing the direction you are facing when teleporting them.
Fisherman.details2: Fisherman is granted Projectile Protection 10, Feather Falling 2 on Leggings.

Bomber.desc: Bomber causes devastating area damage with explosives.
Bomber.passive_ability: Takedowns grants TNT and speed for a duration.
Bomber.active_ability: Instantly ignites placed TNT deal area damage and significant knockback.
Bomber.details1: Bomber is granted Blast Protection 10 and Feather Falling 5 on Boots.
Bomber.details2: The TNT should override soups in inventory priority.

Ninja.desc: Ninja is a shadow assassin that teleports behind targets.
Ninja.passive_ability: Teleporting makes you dodge all incoming attacks and projectiles for a short duration.
Ninja.active_ability: Teleport behind your last hit target or closest target.
Ninja.details1: The ability should not be put on cooldown if no one is in range.
Ninja.details2: Spawns with 8 enderpearls, every takedown grants new enderpearls with a cap of 16.
Ninja.details3: Enderpearl teleportation also apply the passive.
Ninja.details4: Ninja is granted Feather Falling 10 on Boots.

Monkey.desc: Monkey is a trickster whom has mastered the art of confusion.
Monkey.passive_ability: 10% chance to change the opponents weapon to another slot in their hotbar.
Monkey.active_ability: Become totally invisible(Targettable) for a short duration and leave behind a clone.
Monkey.details1: The clone will stand still and poof for the same duration you are invisible, if a player hits the clone they are inflicted blindess.
Monkey.details2: Monkey is granted Projectile Protection 6 on Leggings.

Hyper.desc: Hyper is an agile scout that gains immense speed.
Hyper.passive_ability: Increases speed level for every third hit.
Hyper.details1: Speed level decreases back to level 2 after 4 seconds of not hitting any players.

Rogue.desc: Rogue is a master of stealth and strikes harder from the back.
Rogue.passive_ability: Attacks from behind deal more damage.
Rogue.active_ability: Go completely invisible for a duration. (Targettable)

Phoenix.desc: Phoenix is a soaring bird of fire with endless dashes.
Phoenix.passive_ability: Fall damage is negated and everytime you dash you gain absorption for a short duration.
Phoenix.active_ability: Gain the ability to double jump and dash.
Phoenix.details1: Can only double jump from ground not air.
Phoenix.details2: Dashing/doublejumping through someone ignites them for a short duration.

Pirate.desc: Pirate excels at plundering by dominating his area.
Pirate.passive_ability: For every takedown you are granted double gold and golden apples.
Pirate.active_ability: Consuming a golden apple will cleanse all debuffs, gain immunity and dash forwards every hit for a duration.

Remnant.desc: Remnant lingers between life and death.
Remnant.passive_ability: Upon fatal damage, become untargettable for a duration, taking revenge within this time revives you.
Remnant.active_ability: Throw a snowball to swap positions and inflict blindness for a duration.
Remnant.details1: Entering Limbo sets the player health to half a health and removes all armor for the duration until revive / death.
Remnant.details2: Reviving sets the player health to maximum and restore all armour.

Ranged.desc: Damage opponents from afar whilst keeping your distance.

Inferno.desc: Inferno shoots flaming arrows that sets opponents ablaze.
Inferno.passive_ability: Sets targets ablaze on arrow hit for a duration.

Scout.desc: Scout is a lethal archer that suffocates their prey.
Scout.passive_ability: Every third arrow hit on the same target applies wither and grants invisibility for a short duration.
Scout.details1: Whilst the enemy is withered, mortality is applied.

Artillery.desc: Artillery has impeccable damage but has to be careful.
Artillery.passive_ability: Get one arrow every 5 seconds, if you do not have one already.
Artillery.active_ability: Fire an orbital missile from above to deal massive damage.
Artillery.details1: Refund the arrow if a player was hit.

Snowman.desc: Snowman slows opponents and is quick on their feet.
Snowman.passive_ability: Apply slowness on arrow hit for a short duration.
Snowman.active_ability: Cast a snowball and transform the area it hits into ice or create an ice wall, anyone caught in the ice is slowed for a duration.

Wisp.desc: Wisp is a spectral archer that is extremely lethal.
Wisp.passive_ability: Mark opponents with your arrow hits for a duration.
Wisp.active_ability: Blinds and stuns all your marked targets for a short duration, arrow hits on stunned targets deals massive damage.

Tank.desc: Endure brutal amounts of unimaginable damage.

Star.desc: Star is a celestial titan that stuns nearby players to restore health.
Star.passive_ability: Exert a gravitational pull that slowly drags nearby players toward you.
Star.active_ability: Emit a cosmic pulse that stuns in a radius, if anyone is caught instantly restore health.
Star.details1: The stunned players may not be able to move at all, however they should be able to freely move their direction they are facing and still damage nearby players.
Star.details2: Do not restore any health if nobody was stunned in the area, and put the ability on cooldown.
Star.details3: Star has permanent Health Boost 10 and Slowness 1

Dragon.desc: Dragon is a legendary combatant whom blasts targets aflame.
Dragon.passive_ability: Regenerate 5% maximum health every second and gain fury for every hit taken.
Dragon.active_ability: Consume all fury to blast nearby enemies to deal pre-mitigation damage and knockback, setting all targets ablaze for a short duration.
Dragon.details1: Start decaying fury after 10 seconds of inactive combat.

Hedgehog.desc: Hedgehog is extremely resilient that reflects melee damage.
Hedgehog.details1: Does not reflect projectile damage only melee damage.

Juggernaut.desc: Juggernaut is a massive giant that gains permanent health for every takedown.
Juggernaut.active_ability: Gain immense regeneration for a duration.
Juggernaut.details1: Juggernaut has permanent Slowness 1 and starts off with Health Boost 5.
Juggernaut.details2: Slowness is removed for the duration of the active.

Behemoth.desc: Behemoth is an ungodly titan that gains resistance as its health drops.
Behemoth.passive_ability: Gain resistance for every 25% of maximum health lost.
Behemoth.active_ability: Gain absorption hearts for a short duration.
Behemoth.details1: Maximum Resistance level stacking reached at 25% of maximum health.
